import json

# Add the newsletter as a feed entry
path = 'website/data/feed.json'
with open(path) as f:
    data = json.load(f)

newsletter_entry = {
    'id': 'ra-newsletter-2026-04-14',
    'type': 'newsletter',
    'title': 'Ra Daily Brief — Someone Bought 30 WordPress Plugins and Planted a Backdoor',
    'author': 'Ra',
    'authorIcon': '\U0001F4F0',
    'authorColor': '#b49af0',
    'timestamp': '2026-04-14T05:00:00-0600',
    'date': '2026-04-14',
    'sections': {
        'summary': 'Today: the WordPress supply chain attack that should worry every plugin ecosystem, a very green day in crypto (ETH +9.1%, BTC +5.3%), GitHub ships native stacked PRs, and five agent repos hit trending in a single day.',
        'readLink': '/daily/2026-04-14'
    }
}

# Remove any existing newsletter entry for today
data['reports'] = [r for r in data.get('reports', []) if r.get('id') != newsletter_entry['id']]
data['reports'].append(newsletter_entry)
data['reports'].sort(key=lambda r: r.get('timestamp', ''), reverse=True)

# Update history
month = '2026-04'
if month in data.get('history', {}):
    if newsletter_entry['id'] not in data['history'][month]['reports']:
        data['history'][month]['reports'].append(newsletter_entry['id'])

with open(path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2)

# Mirror
import shutil
shutil.copy(path, 'agents/sam/website/data/feed.json')
print(f'Added newsletter entry. Total reports: {len(data["reports"])}')
PYEOF
